title: Living in Boulder vlog 8 -  27 -  2017: Strava Pages Video Screen Capture on Rollers day 2

enrichment.summary: Kyle records a late-night redo vlog (original failed due to audio issues) about his new indoor bike riding setup in his Boulder room. He describes doing Strava segment screen captures for a planned YouTube channel called 'Kyle Pounds Google Earth,' and talks about his fan setup and plans to continue riding indoors.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: enjoys it and is actively optimizing it with fans and a table around the bike
finds it a good opportunity to ride since he can't do much else while recording
works faster on the bike than sitting on the couch

entities: Kyle Pounds Google Earth (planned YouTube channel)

transcript.text: Hello, I just recorded a video, but it didn't record because my converter was going, and I think the converter freaked it out, and I didn't notice.

It made it like three and a half minutes in, and the sound was really bad, so, because even though my microphone was plugged into my computer, it's like, it's not working, so I need to call and find out what's wrong.

Um, so, uh, I'll just do the vlog all over again, like, take two vlog, so it's, uh, 3.30 in the morning on August, plus the sound will be better on this one, 28th, and so this one will be for the August 27th.

I haven't done a video for a while, a few days, because I, uh, yeah, I was just too busy, I guess, doing whatever I was doing, um, and, uh, yeah, but, yeah, but now I'll be motivated to do a video every day.

Um, I started riding my bike, um, in my room yesterday, and, um, that was awesome, um, because I got to this point on my website where, see, I should have been riding my bike before, but I was just too, you know, motivated to get as much done as I could, so.

You can work a little bit faster when you're sitting on the couch, and longer, too, but, um, but, yeah, I, um, I got to a point where I'm, all I'm doing is doing screen captures of all these Strava segments.
I want to put them on a new, um, YouTube channel called, uh, Kyle Pound's Google Earth, and so I've got thousands of videos I can put up there.
It's going to be amazing, um, and hundreds of playlists, history, and all that stuff, so, uh, but, uh, yeah, so I'm recording, so I can't do anything else when I'm recording video screen captures.
And so, it's up every time to start riding, and then I can just watch it, and then record it, and ride, and listen to stuff.

I'm going to sober up, and do more, uh, do talking videos, and book reviews, and stuff, um, since I sober up, I ran out of reefer today, but, um, I started riding yesterday, and I didn't want to, I wanted to reefer ride for a few days inside.
Um, it's fun to ride, um, it's fun to reefer ride outside, but it's probably even more fun to reefer ride inside, because, uh, there's just more stuff to reefer out on.
Um, um, I, like, yesterday, I perfected my, uh, bike table, um, I can, um, attach, I went today, went and bought, uh, wood, and I'll do, I'll show the video later.

Um, so, yeah, I have this, like, table all around my bike, and I take and put stuff, and, um, I think tomorrow I'm going to even make it cushier, and go to Target and buy, uh, more fans to come in from the side.
I have three fans from the front, but, and I might even get four or four more fans on the side, so I have seven fans.
So, I'm just constantly, and it's just, like, tornado of air, so that I never sweat at all, no matter how hot it is.
And, um, I have a lot of light in there, too, because I have, um, like, two, one of you, which I'll do the video later, but, yeah, so today was, like, my first day, so I was, like, you know,
What's going on, what's going on, what's going on?
